name: Great Sorcerer of the Nekroz
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>影霊衣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ネクロス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>道</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is Tributed by a card effect: You can add 1 Spellcaster-Type "Nekroz" Ritual Monster from your Deck to your hand. If this card is banished: You can send 1 "Nekroz" monster from your Deck to the Graveyard, except "Great Sorcerer of the Nekroz". You can only use 1 "Great Sorcerer of the Nekroz" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Tributed by a card effect: You can add 1 Spellcaster-Type "Nekroz" Ritual Monster from your Deck to your hand. If this card is banished: You can send 1 "Nekroz" monster from your Deck to the Graveyard, except "Great Sorcerer of the Nekroz". You can only use 1 "Great Sorcerer of the Nekroz" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
